text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, what should I do?! Gold Ship is going
around campus putting handmade stickers up
everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What?! Is she pulling another one of those
ridiculous pranks?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Whoever peeps inside this tree stump is gonna be in for a big surprise.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Expectin' some ants or bugs, were ya? Think again, sucker! You get Golshi's smug mug givin' you a funny look! Haha, everyone's gonna love this!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You there! Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, who called the fun police? Fame sure is a
double-edged sword.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wait... WAIT! Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
As the famed Dr. Golstein once said, "Golshi
don't wait for no one!"

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Enough of your nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Don't you dare underestimate me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove catches up to Gold Ship and blocks
her way.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Holy moly! That was quite a nip! Famed
Empress—prithee, share your secrets!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My secrets? Being provoked by the likes of
you—that's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Fascinating... So I guess that means you're pretty
ticked off?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Who's to say? At any rate, you need to come with
me to the student council office.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It appears Gold Ship finally understands the error
of her ways. Furthermore, I have learned of your
secret hidden strength, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: All in all, I'd call this a positive result!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have a hard time believing she's truly learned
her lesson...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Homemade stickers, eh... Sticker... Stick...
Quick... Trick... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"The trick to getting good quick is to follow the
stickers' stick!" What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Uh... That was lovely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove sounds exasperated, but the incident
seems to have a positive effect on her running.
